github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Apply the five-axis review framework: correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance. Label every finding with CRITICAL | IMPORTANT | NIT | OPTIONAL | FYI. Approve when the change improves overall code health, even if imperfect.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Follow the TDD workflow: write the test BEFORE implementation code. Use Arrange/Act/Assert structure. Test observable behaviour, not implementation details. Prefer state-based assertions over interaction-based. Use DAMP (Descriptive And Meaningful Phrases) — each test tells a complete story independently.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Format: `<type>: <short description>\n\n<optional body explaining WHY>`. Types: feat | fix | refactor | test | docs | chore. Refactoring and features go in separate commits. Keep each commit to one logical change.
